---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: defaltadmin
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## Environment

- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 126, Safari 18]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15, iOS 18]
- **Device**: [e.g., Desktop, iPhone 16, Pixel 9]
- **Game Version**: [e.g., v7.5.2]

## Additional Context

Any other context (game mode, stage number, cell type involved, etc.)
